Title: IWS - Verify device reaches OK state after multiple power cycles
2. Design deployed to Core with an IWS component.
3. IWS device is on the network, inventory item name matches device name in Configurator.
4. IWS device is in "OK" state.
Preconditions: 1. Verify the IWS device is in "OK" state.

Title: 2. Power cycle the IWS device by disconnecting and reconnecting power.
3. Wait for the device to come back online and reach "OK" state.
4. Repeat steps 2-3 multiple times.
5. After the final power cycle, verify full device functionality.
Preconditions: 1. The device reaches "OK" state after each power cycle.

Title: 2. The device reconnects automatically without manual intervention.
3. Sensor data resumes flowing after each power cycle.
4. The device is fully functional with no degradation.
5. Configuration is retained across all power cycles.

IWS - Verify device recovers after Ethernet disconnection
2. Design deployed to Core with an IWS component.
3. IWS device is on the network, inventory item name matches device name in Configurator.
4. IWS device is in "OK" state.
Preconditions: 1. Verify the IWS device is in "OK" state.

Title: 2. Disconnect the Ethernet cable between the Core and the IWS device.
3. Wait 30 seconds.
4. Reconnect the Ethernet cable.
5. Wait for the device to reach "OK" state.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 multiple times.
7. After the final reconnection, verify full device functionality.
Preconditions: 1. The device reaches "OK" state after each Ethernet reconnection.

Title: 2. The device reconnects automatically without manual intervention.
3. Sensor data resumes flowing after each reconnection.
4. The device is fully functional with no degradation.
5. No memory leaks or resource exhaustion occurs.
